-- ⚠ Ranger wildcard schema pattern: user_{USER }*  →  SQL LIKE: 'user_{USER }%'
-- UC does not support wildcards in GRANT ON SCHEMA.
-- The block below loops through all matching schemas and applies the grant.
-- Requires Databricks Runtime 14.0+ or a SQL Warehouse with scripting enabled.
BEGIN
  FOR sch AS (
    SELECT schema_name
    FROM `main`.information_schema.schemata
    WHERE catalog_name = 'main'
      AND schema_name LIKE 'user_{USER }%'
  ) DO
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format('GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `public`');
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format('GRANT USE SCHEMA ON SCHEMA `main`.`%s` TO `public`', sch.schema_name);
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format('GRANT SELECT ON SCHEMA `main`.`%s` TO `public`', sch.schema_name);
    EXECUTE IMMEDIATE format('GRANT MODIFY ON SCHEMA `main`.`%s` TO `public`', sch.schema_name);
  END FOR;
END;
